name: How much is my case worth if AI Overview tanked my site traffic?

mainEntity.name: How much is my case worth if AI Overview tanked my site traffic?

acceptedAnswer.text: Quantify losses; expect low settlement value.
acceptedAnswer.description: Lost profits x duration, plus reputational; often $10k-$100k small claims, but 230 kills most.[3] Key factors: Projections; experts. Get valuation.
